name: Invoice Gen — Webhook → Claude → Gmail → Sheets

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "ok": true,
  "invoiceNumber": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Invoice').item.json.invoiceNumber) }},
  "client": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Invoice').item.json.client) }},
  "clientEmail": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Invoice').item.json.clientEmail) }},
  "subtotal": {{ $('Assemble Invoice').item.json.subtotal }},
  "gst": {{ $('Assemble Invoice').item.json.gst }},
  "total": {{ $('Assemble Invoice').item.json.total }},
  "date": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Invoice').item.json.dateStr) }},
  "invoiceHtml": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Invoice').item.json.invoiceHtml) }},
  "emailSent": true,
  "loggedToSheet": true,
  "timing": { "totalMs": {{ Date.now() - ($('Assemble Invoice').item.json.startTs || Date.now()) }} }
}
